---
title: "Batching Profile Harness"
params:
  device: "gpu"
  benchmark_tag: "gpu_default"
  cache_version: "v1"
  scenario_set: "factor_grid"      # smoke | factor_grid | full_grid
  request_file: null
  participant_set: "full_set"      # full_set | small_set
  participant_count: 1
  panel_batch_size: 1
  model_family: "ar1"
  pooling_mode: "unit_specific"
  covariate_mode: "none"
  analysis_start_utc_iso: "2024-07-01T00:00:00+00:00"
  analysis_end_utc_iso: "2024-09-30T23:00:00+00:00"
  assumed_local_timezone: "America/New_York"
  random_seed: 2026
  warmup_run: true
  trace_enabled: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fullpage}
number-sections: true
---

## Purpose

This document profiles the batching behavior of the one-stage panel search. It is designed to answer a narrow question: when we change starts, IF2 iterations, and particles, how much time stays on the host versus how much lands inside the batched GPU search calls. The CSV summary reports approximate host setup time, synchronized device wall time, and host copy-back time. When `trace_enabled=true`, each scenario also writes a JAX profiler trace directory for exact timeline inspection.

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]

device = "gpu"
benchmark_tag = "gpu_default"
cache_version = "v1"
scenario_set = "factor_grid"
request_file = None
participant_set = "full_set"
participant_count = 1
panel_batch_size = 1
model_family = "ar1"
pooling_mode = "unit_specific"
covariate_mode = "none"
analysis_start_utc_iso = "2024-07-01T00:00:00+00:00"
analysis_end_utc_iso = "2024-09-30T23:00:00+00:00"
assumed_local_timezone = "America/New_York"
random_seed = 2026
warmup_run = True
trace_enabled = True
```

```{python}
#| label: profile-interface

import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
import yaml
from IPython.display import display


PROJECT_ROOT = Path.cwd().resolve()
APP_CODE_ROOT = PROJECT_ROOT.parent / "eda"

if str(PROJECT_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_ROOT))
if str(APP_CODE_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(APP_CODE_ROOT))


def _raw_params() -> dict:
    parameter_keys = [
        "device",
        "benchmark_tag",
        "cache_version",
        "scenario_set",
        "request_file",
        "participant_set",
        "participant_count",
        "panel_batch_size",
        "model_family",
        "pooling_mode",
        "covariate_mode",
        "analysis_start_utc_iso",
        "analysis_end_utc_iso",
        "assumed_local_timezone",
        "random_seed",
        "warmup_run",
        "trace_enabled",
    ]
    injected = {key: globals()[key] for key in parameter_keys if key in globals()}
    if injected:
        return injected
    try:
        raw = dict(params)
        if raw:
            return raw
    except Exception:
        pass
    qmd_path = PROJECT_ROOT / "computebatchprofile.qmd"
    text = qmd_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if not text.startswith("---"):
        return {}
    end_idx = text.find("\n---", 4)
    if end_idx < 0:
        return {}
    frontmatter = yaml.safe_load(text[4:end_idx]) or {}
    params_block = frontmatter.get("params", {})
    return dict(params_block) if isinstance(params_block, dict) else {}


def _resolve_params(raw: dict[str, object]) -> dict[str, object]:
    def _as_bool(value: object) -> bool:
        if isinstance(value, bool):
            return value
        if isinstance(value, str):
            return value.strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}
        return bool(value)

    resolved = dict(raw)
    resolved["device"] = str(resolved.get("device", "gpu")).strip().lower()
    resolved["benchmark_tag"] = str(resolved.get("benchmark_tag", "gpu_default")).strip()
    resolved["cache_version"] = str(resolved.get("cache_version", "v1")).strip()
    resolved["scenario_set"] = str(resolved.get("scenario_set", "factor_grid")).strip().lower()
    request_file_value = resolved.get("request_file")
    resolved["request_file"] = None if request_file_value in {None, "", "null"} else str(request_file_value).strip()
    resolved["participant_set"] = str(resolved.get("participant_set", "full_set")).strip().lower()
    resolved["participant_count"] = int(resolved.get("participant_count", 1))
    resolved["panel_batch_size"] = int(resolved.get("panel_batch_size", resolved["participant_count"]))
    resolved["model_family"] = str(resolved.get("model_family", "ar1")).strip()
    resolved["pooling_mode"] = str(resolved.get("pooling_mode", "unit_specific")).strip()
    resolved["covariate_mode"] = str(resolved.get("covariate_mode", "none")).strip()
    resolved["analysis_start_utc_iso"] = str(resolved.get("analysis_start_utc_iso"))
    resolved["analysis_end_utc_iso"] = str(resolved.get("analysis_end_utc_iso"))
    resolved["assumed_local_timezone"] = str(resolved.get("assumed_local_timezone", "America/New_York")).strip()
    resolved["random_seed"] = int(resolved.get("random_seed", 2026))
    resolved["warmup_run"] = _as_bool(resolved.get("warmup_run", True))
    resolved["trace_enabled"] = _as_bool(resolved.get("trace_enabled", True))
    return resolved


resolved_params = _resolve_params(_raw_params())
requested_device = resolved_params["device"]
os.environ["JAX_PLATFORMS"] = "cuda" if requested_device == "gpu" else "cpu"

from helpers.computebatchprofile import load_batch_profile_request, resolve_batch_profile_request_path

imported_request_payload = None
if resolved_params["request_file"]:
    request_path = resolve_batch_profile_request_path(PROJECT_ROOT, resolved_params["request_file"])
    imported_request_payload = load_batch_profile_request(request_path)
    request_settings = imported_request_payload.get("settings", {})
    if isinstance(request_settings, dict):
        for key, value in request_settings.items():
            resolved_params[key] = value
        resolved_params["device"] = requested_device

CSV_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "FitbitHourly.csv"
if not CSV_PATH.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError("FitbitHourly.csv must be in the same folder as computebatchprofile.qmd.")


def _display_table(df: pd.DataFrame, *, precision: int = 3) -> None:
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index").format(precision=precision, na_rep=""))


settings_table = pd.DataFrame([{"Setting": key, "Value": value} for key, value in resolved_params.items()])
_display_table(settings_table, precision=4)
if imported_request_payload is not None:
    imported_request_table = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"Setting": "request_hash", "Value": imported_request_payload.get("request_hash")},
            {"Setting": "label", "Value": imported_request_payload.get("label")},
            {"Setting": "n_scenarios", "Value": len(imported_request_payload.get("scenarios", []))},
        ]
    )
    _display_table(imported_request_table, precision=4)
```

```{python}
#| label: profile-run

import jax

from helpers.computebatchprofile import BatchProfileScenario, run_batching_profile_suite


backend = str(jax.default_backend())
devices = [device.platform for device in jax.devices()]
if requested_device == "gpu":
    if backend != "gpu" or "gpu" not in devices:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "device='gpu' was requested, but JAX did not initialize a GPU backend. "
            f"default_backend={backend!r}, devices={devices!r}"
        )
elif backend != "cpu":
    raise RuntimeError(
        "device='cpu' was requested, but JAX initialized a different backend. "
        f"default_backend={backend!r}"
    )

profile_result = run_batching_profile_suite(
    CSV_PATH,
    project_root=PROJECT_ROOT,
    benchmark_tag=resolved_params["benchmark_tag"],
    cache_version=resolved_params["cache_version"],
    scenario_set=resolved_params["scenario_set"],
    participant_set=resolved_params["participant_set"],
    participant_count=resolved_params["participant_count"],
    panel_batch_size=resolved_params["panel_batch_size"],
    model_family=resolved_params["model_family"],
    pooling_mode=resolved_params["pooling_mode"],
    covariate_mode=resolved_params["covariate_mode"],
    analysis_start_utc_iso=resolved_params["analysis_start_utc_iso"],
    analysis_end_utc_iso=resolved_params["analysis_end_utc_iso"],
    assumed_local_timezone=resolved_params["assumed_local_timezone"],
    random_seed=resolved_params["random_seed"],
    warmup_run=resolved_params["warmup_run"],
    trace_enabled=resolved_params["trace_enabled"],
    scenarios=(
        None
        if imported_request_payload is None
        else [BatchProfileScenario(**row) for row in imported_request_payload.get("scenarios", [])]
    ),
)

manifest = profile_result["manifest"]
scenario_summary = profile_result["scenario_summary"]
stage_profile_details = profile_result["stage_profile_details"]
trace_manifest = profile_result["trace_manifest"]

run_info = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "run_dir": str(profile_result["run_dir"]),
            "scenario_summary_path": manifest["scenario_summary_path"],
            "stage_profile_path": manifest["stage_profile_path"],
            "trace_manifest_path": manifest["trace_manifest_path"],
            "participant_count": manifest["participant_count"],
            "scenario_set": manifest["scenario_set"],
            "trace_enabled": manifest["trace_enabled"],
        }
    ]
)
```

## Run Output

```{python}
#| label: profile-run-output

_display_table(run_info)
```

## Scenario Summary

```{python}
#| label: profile-scenarios

if scenario_summary.empty:
    print("No scenario summary rows were recorded.")
else:
    print("Scenario inputs")
    scenario_inputs = scenario_summary[
        [
            "scenario_id",
            "n_starts",
            "particles",
            "mif_iterations",
            "evaluation_particles",
            "evaluation_pfilter_reps",
        ]
    ].rename(
        columns={
            "scenario_id": "scenario",
            "n_starts": "starts",
            "particles": "IF2 J",
            "mif_iterations": "IF2 iter",
            "evaluation_particles": "eval J",
            "evaluation_pfilter_reps": "eval reps",
        }
    )
    _display_table(scenario_inputs, precision=2)

    print("Scenario runtimes")
    runtime_columns = [
        "scenario_id",
        "approx_host_setup_seconds",
        "approx_device_wall_seconds",
        "approx_host_copyback_seconds",
        "stage_runtime_seconds",
        "search_total_runtime_seconds",
    ]
    if "runtime_vs_base" in scenario_summary.columns:
        runtime_columns.append("runtime_vs_base")
    scenario_runtime = scenario_summary[runtime_columns].rename(
        columns={
            "scenario_id": "scenario",
            "approx_host_setup_seconds": "host setup (s)",
            "approx_device_wall_seconds": "device wall (s)",
            "approx_host_copyback_seconds": "copyback (s)",
            "stage_runtime_seconds": "stage total (s)",
            "search_total_runtime_seconds": "search total (s)",
            "runtime_vs_base": "x base",
        }
    )
    _display_table(scenario_runtime, precision=3)
```

## Stage Breakdown

```{python}
#| label: profile-stage-breakdown

if stage_profile_details.empty:
    print("No stage profile rows were recorded.")
else:
    print("Core stage timing")
    stage_core = stage_profile_details[
        [
            "scenario_id",
            "n_starts",
            "particles",
            "mif_iterations",
            "mif_wall_seconds",
            "pfilter_wall_seconds",
            "stage_runtime_seconds",
        ]
    ].rename(
        columns={
            "scenario_id": "scenario",
            "n_starts": "starts",
            "particles": "IF2 J",
            "mif_iterations": "IF2 iter",
            "mif_wall_seconds": "mif wall (s)",
            "pfilter_wall_seconds": "pfilter wall (s)",
            "stage_runtime_seconds": "stage total (s)",
        }
    )
    _display_table(stage_core, precision=3)

    print("Host-side timing")
    stage_host = stage_profile_details[
        [
            "scenario_id",
            "candidate_build_seconds",
            "theta_panel_build_seconds",
            "results_materialize_seconds",
            "approx_host_setup_seconds",
            "approx_host_copyback_seconds",
        ]
    ].rename(
        columns={
            "scenario_id": "scenario",
            "candidate_build_seconds": "candidate build (s)",
            "theta_panel_build_seconds": "theta/panel build (s)",
            "results_materialize_seconds": "materialize (s)",
            "approx_host_setup_seconds": "host setup (s)",
            "approx_host_copyback_seconds": "host copyback (s)",
        }
    )
    _display_table(stage_host, precision=3)
```

## Trace Paths

```{python}
#| label: profile-traces

if trace_manifest.empty:
    print("Tracing disabled for this run.")
else:
    trace_display = trace_manifest.copy()
    if "trace_dir" in trace_display.columns:
        trace_display["trace_dir"] = trace_display["trace_dir"].astype(str)
    display_columns = [column for column in ["scenario_id", "trace_dir"] if column in trace_display.columns]
    _display_table(trace_display[display_columns] if display_columns else trace_display, precision=3)
```

## Notes

- `approx_device_wall_seconds` is synchronized wall time spent inside the batched `panel.mif` and `panel.pfilter` calls. This is the best available approximation to CUDA work from Python timing.
- `approx_host_setup_seconds` is host-side candidate generation, theta assembly, and `PanelPomp` construction before the batched GPU calls.
- `approx_host_copyback_seconds` is host-side results materialization after the batched GPU calls.
- For exact host vs kernel timelines, use the trace directories in `trace_manifest.csv`.
